caption: The video features a man performing on stage, holding an acoustic guitar and singing into a microphone. He is dressed in a white shirt with a black vest adorned with intricate blue embroidery and a red and black pendant. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden paneling in the background, suggesting a cozy or intimate venue. The audience, visible in the foreground, is attentively watching and listening to the performance. The atmosphere seems calm and focused, with the performer fully engaged in his music. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, possibly indicating the name of the event or organization hosting the performance.
